{{Infobox character
| name = Kell’arack
| aliases = Kell'arack, Kelalrac
| appears_in = Elder Empire
| introduced = [[Of Kings and Killers (novel)|Of Kings and Killers]]
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Kell’arack, also known as [[Kelarac]], is a [[Great Elder]] and a massive ocean-dwelling creature described as having the appearance of a shark with stony, pitted skin. His scale is immense, comparable to an [[island]] or large enough to eclipse the sun. He is characterized as a soul collector who has spent his existence securing servants through various deals. Physically, he lacks eyes and wears a rusted [[steel blindfold]] bolted to his face, a mark associated with those he has enslaved. He possesses vast treasure vaults containing an array of weapons and various objects, which he can command to attack. [[Kelarac]] is also known for his ability to manipulate others through promises of prosperity and protection, attempting to influence human leaders by offering eternal rule or paradise. He views the world as a prison and perceives humans as mere insects within it.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Kell'arack is a being to whom one might toss their brainpan if they feed something too well.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c19">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Of Kings and Killers ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Kell’arack]] was blinded and nailed to the floor of the [[Aion Sea]] by someone.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c6">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Lyathatan]] has a deal with [[Kell’arack]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c22">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Of Killers and Kings ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Kell’arack]] is coming for them.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c24">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Kelalrac wears a blindfold.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c26">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
